title: verbascum × parallelum
intro: Verbascum × hybrida, also known as Verbascum × parallelum, is a hybrid plant belonging to the snapdragon family (Scrophulariaceae) and is a cross between Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum chaixii. The Verbascum × parallelum plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant's health benefits include its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in soothing skin irritations and reducing fever. In herbal preparations, Verbascum × parallelum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
